facts.claim: Set sail on Anthem of the Seas to the best scenic cruise destinations like Bermuda, St. Kitts and the rugged coasts of the Canaries while experiencing all the amazing things to do onboard Anthem of the Seas.
Fill your days with non-stop thrills onboard the adventure-packed Anthem of the Seas®.
Anthem of the Seas is a Quantum-class cruise ship owned by Royal Caribbean International (RCI) and the second ship of her class.
